# AI Atlas by Turtleand

> A curated directory of AI tools with detailed profiles, use cases, and honest evaluations.

## Tools

### Chatbot
- [ChatGPT](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#chatgpt): OpenAI's conversational AI
- [Claude](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#claude): Anthropic's AI assistant
- [Grok](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#grok): xAI's chatbot
- [Gemini](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#gemini): Google's AI assistant
- [Sesame](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#sesame): Voice-based AI companion

### Images
- [Nano Banana](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#nano-banana): AI image generation
- [ChatGPT Image](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#chatgpt-image): OpenAI's image generation in ChatGPT
- [Recraft](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#recraft): AI image generation and design
- [Adobe Express](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#adobe-express): AI background removal
- [Gemini Drawing](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#gemini-drawing): Collaborative AI drawing

### Video Generation
- [Sora](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#sora): OpenAI's text-to-video model
- [VEO 3](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#veo-3): Google's AI video generation
- [Hailuo Minimax](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#hailuo-minimax): AI video generation

### Code
- [GitHub Copilot](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#github-copilot): AI pair programmer
- [Claude Code](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#claude-code): AI coding assistant in terminal
- [Cursor](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#cursor): AI-first code editor
- [Sourcegraph DeepSearch](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#sourcegraph-deepsearch): AI-powered semantic code search
- [Sourcegraph AMP](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#sourcegraph-amp): Agentic coding with autonomous workflows
- [OpenAI Codex](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#openai-codex): Code generation model powering Copilot

### Research
- [ChatGPT Deep Search](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#chatgpt-deep-search): Advanced AI research
- [Perplexity Comet](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#perplexity-comet): AI-powered desktop assistant

### Education
- [NotebookLM](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#notebooklm): AI-powered learning notebook
- [Gamma](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#gamma): AI presentation creation

### Local & Infrastructure
- [llama.cpp](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#llama-cpp): Local LLM inference engine
- [Hugging Face](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#hugging-face): Model repository & community hub

### Agents
- [OpenClaw](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#openclaw): Persistent AI agent platform

### Auxiliary Tools
- [ntfy](https://ai-atlas.turtleand.com/#ntfy): Push notifications for AI agents

## About
Curated by Turtleand — exploring how humans and technology evolve together.
- Portal: https://turtleand.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/turtleand
